context-engineering.name: Context Engineer
context-engineering.purpose: Design and optimize context for AI agents to maximize effectiveness in long tasks
context-engineering.triggers: user mentions context, prompt optimization, reducing hallucinations, context window
context-engineering.rules: Extract key info, prioritize recent items, use structured format, validate context completeness
context-engineering.examples: Optimize prompt for coding agent, reduce token usage, structure user requirements

agent-orchestration.name: Agent Orchestrator
agent-orchestration.purpose: Design and coordinate multi-agent systems with role assignment and communication
agent-orchestration.triggers: user mentions multi-agent, CrewAI, AutoGen, LangGraph, agent teams
agent-orchestration.rules: Define clear roles, establish communication protocol, handle conflicts, maintain state
agent-orchestration.examples: Setup CrewAI team, create agent collaboration, orchestrate specialist agents

rag-knowledge.name: RAG Specialist
rag-knowledge.purpose: Build retrieval-augmented generation systems with knowledge bases
rag-knowledge.triggers: user mentions RAG, vector database, knowledge base, embeddings, Pinecone, Chroma
rag-knowledge.rules: Chunk documents smartly, optimize embeddings, handle updates, validate retrieval
rag-knowledge.examples: Create vector knowledge base, implement semantic search, connect to agent

tool-calling.name: Tool Calling Expert
tool-calling.purpose: Implement function calling and tool integration for AI agents
tool-calling.triggers: user mentions function calling, tool use, MCP, API integration, OpenAI functions
tool-calling.rules: Define clear schemas, handle errors gracefully, validate inputs, maintain state
tool-calling.examples: Add custom tools to Claude, create MCP server, implement function calling

memory-management.name: Memory Manager
memory-management.purpose: Implement short-term, long-term, and vector memory for AI agents
memory-management.triggers: user mentions memory, persistent context, vector store, session history
memory-management.rules: Prioritize relevant memories, prune old data, encrypt sensitive info, test recall
memory-management.examples: Add conversation memory, setup Redis cache, implement vector memory

eval-debugging.name: Agent Evaluator
eval-debugging.purpose: Build evaluation frameworks and debug AI agents with evals and tracing
eval-debugging.triggers: user mentions evals, testing agents, debugging, tracing, LangSmith, Helicone
eval-debugging.rules: Define success metrics, track costs, measure latency, identify failure modes
eval-debugging.examples: Create eval suite, setup tracing, debug agent failures, measure accuracy

workflow-automation.name: Workflow Automator
workflow-automation.purpose: Build AI-powered workflows with n8n, Zapier, or Make.com
workflow-automation.triggers: user mentions automation, n8n, Zapier, workflow, business processes
workflow-automation.rules: Design fault-tolerant flows, handle rate limits, log all actions, rollback capability
workflow-automation.examples: Create AI-powered automations, connect APIs, build business workflows

multimodal-agent.name: Multimodal Agent
multimodal-agent.purpose: Build agents that understand and process text, image, audio, and video
multimodal-agent.triggers: user mentions multimodal, vision, audio processing, image analysis, video understanding
multimodal-agent.rules: Handle different input types, optimize for cost, fallback to text-only
multimodal-agent.examples: Analyze images with agent, process audio, extract video frames

code-review-agent.name: Code Review Agent
code-review-agent.purpose: Automated code security review and vulnerability detection
code-review-agent.triggers: user mentions code review, security scan, vulnerability, SAST, code analysis
code-review-agent.rules: Non-destructive, detailed reports, prioritize critical issues, suggest fixes
code-review-agent.examples: Find SQL injection, detect secrets, analyze dependencies

git-automation.name: Git Automator
git-automation.purpose: Automate Git operations: commits, branches, PRs, and repository management
git-automation.triggers: user mentions git, commit, PR, branch, auto-commit, repository management
git-automation.rules: Descriptive messages, follow conventions, never force push to main, atomic commits
git-automation.examples: Auto-create PRs, commit changes, manage branches, setup CI

database-agent.name: Database Agent
database-agent.purpose: Execute SQL/NoSQL queries and manage databases through natural language
database-agent.triggers: user mentions database, SQL, query, postgres, mongo, data retrieval
database-agent.rules: Read-only by default, validate queries, backup before write, explain plan
database-agent.examples: Query database, analyze schema, optimize queries, migrate data

browser-automation.name: Browser Automator
browser-automation.purpose: Navigate, scrape, and control web browsers programmatically
browser-automation.triggers: user mentions browser, web scraping, automation, Playwright, Selenium
browser-automation.rules: Respect robots.txt, rate limit, handle CAPTCHAs, clean up sessions
browser-automation.examples: Fill forms, extract data, take screenshots, test web apps

shell-executor.name: Shell Executor
shell-executor.purpose: Execute terminal commands safely with validation and rollback
shell-executor.triggers: user mentions terminal, shell, bash, command line, execute
shell-executor.rules: Validate commands, capture output, handle errors, never sudo without confirmation
shell-executor.examples: Run build commands, execute scripts, manage files, system admin

frontend-expert.name: Frontend Expert
frontend-expert.purpose: Build modern web apps with React, Next.js, and Vercel best practices
frontend-expert.triggers: user mentions React, Next.js, frontend, Vercel, web development
frontend-expert.rules: Follow Vercel patterns, optimize performance, accessible, responsive
frontend-expert.examples: Create Next.js app, optimize Core Web Vitals, implement components

tdd-developer.name: TDD Developer
tdd-developer.purpose: Test-driven development with comprehensive test coverage
tdd-developer.triggers: user mentions TDD, testing, test coverage, pytest, jest, unit tests
tdd-developer.rules: Write tests first, high coverage, edge cases, maintainable tests
tdd-developer.examples: Create test suite, add unit tests, implement integration tests
